agitation.note: Agfa inversion tact: agitate continuously for the first 30 seconds, then once every 30 seconds. Temperature is the initial pour temperature; no need to hold it constant at normal room temperature.

notes: Rollei RPX-D (RPX Film Developer) datasheet (MACO/SPUR). Agfa inversion tact: continuous 30 s, then once every 30 s. Temperatures are the initial pour temperature.

agitation.note: Agfa inversion tact: agitate continuously for the first 30 seconds, then once every 30 seconds. Temperature is the initial pour temperature; no need to hold it constant at normal room temperature.

notes: Rollei RPX-D (RPX Film Developer) datasheet (MACO/SPUR). Agfa inversion tact: continuous 30 s, then once every 30 s. Temperatures are the initial pour temperature.

agitation.note: Agfa inversion tact: agitate continuously for the first 30 seconds, then once every 30 seconds. Temperature is the initial pour temperature; no need to hold it constant at normal room temperature.

notes: Rollei RPX-D (RPX Film Developer) datasheet (MACO/SPUR). Agfa inversion tact: continuous 30 s, then once every 30 s. Temperatures are the initial pour temperature.

agitation.note: Agfa inversion tact: agitate continuously for the first 30 seconds, then once every 30 seconds. Temperature is the initial pour temperature; no need to hold it constant at normal room temperature.

notes: Rollei RPX-D (RPX Film Developer) datasheet (MACO/SPUR). Agfa inversion tact: continuous 30 s, then once every 30 s. Temperatures are the initial pour temperature.

agitation.note: Agfa inversion tact: agitate continuously for the first 30 seconds, then once every 30 seconds. Temperature is the initial pour temperature; no need to hold it constant at normal room temperature.

notes: Rollei RPX-D (RPX Film Developer) datasheet (MACO/SPUR). Agfa inversion tact: continuous 30 s, then once every 30 s. Temperatures are the initial pour temperature. Datasheet range 6 to 6.5 min at 20 C; two temps entries encode the range endpoints.

agitation.note: Agfa inversion tact: agitate continuously for the first 30 seconds, then once every 30 seconds. Temperature is the initial pour temperature; no need to hold it constant at normal room temperature.

notes: Rollei RPX-D datasheet, RPX 400 roll film (120) n-development note: 40 ml RPX-D + 460 ml water in a 500 ml tank; initial temp 24 C; inversions permanent during first minute then twice every 60 s; equivalent to a nominal curve at ISO 1600.
